zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Thomas Killigrew於1385年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾法爾姆斯時，他的父親Lord Simon Killigrew42歲，母親Lady Jane Arwennack60歲。他於1414年與Marie Margaret Boleigh在英國英格蘭可瓦爾阿爾文納可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Thomas Killigrew于1385年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾法爾姆斯时，他的父亲Lord Simon Killigrew42岁，母亲Lady Jane Arwennack60岁。他于1414年与Marie Margaret Boleigh在英国英格兰可瓦爾阿爾文納可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Killigrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Killigrew in Saint Erme (Cornwall).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Thomas Killigrew was born in 1385, in Falmouth, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Simon Killigrew, was 42 and his mother, Lady Jane Arwennack, was 60. He married Marie Margaret Boleigh in 1414, in Arwennack, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Thomas Killigrew est né en 1385, à Falmouth, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Simon Killigrew, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Arwennack, avait 60 ans. Il a épousé Marie Margaret Boleigh en 1414, à Arwennack, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Thomas Killigrew 1385 in Falmouth, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Simon Killigrew 42 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Arwennack 60. Er hat 1414 in Arwennack, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Marie Margaret Boleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Thomas Killigrew è nato il nel 1385 nel Falmouth, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Simon Killigrew, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Arwennack, aveva 60 anni. Lui sposato Marie Margaret Boleigh nel 1414, nel Arwennack, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Thomas Killigrewが1385年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルファルモウスで生まれた時，父Lord Simon Killigrewは42歳，母Lady Jane Arwennackは60歳であった。1414年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルアルウエナックでMarie Margaret Boleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Thomas Killigrew(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 파모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Simon Killigrew(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Arwennack(은)는 60세였다. 그는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 아웬악크에서 Marie Margaret Boleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Thomas Killigrew nasceu em 1385, em Falmouth, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Simon Killigrew, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Arwennack, tinha 60 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Margaret Boleigh em 1414, em Arwennack, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Thomas Killigrew родился в 1385 г. в местности фалмоут, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Simon Killigrew было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Arwennack, 60. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Margaret Boleigh в 1414 г. в местности арвеннакк, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Thomas Killigrew nació en 1385, en Falmouth, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Simon Killigrew, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Arwennack, tenía 60 años. Se casó con Marie Margaret Boleigh en 1414, en Arwennack, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en su pueblo.
